description: Heavy loose freight to residential, no dock
rationale: Residential fires at 0.95. Liftgate score: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + residential+weight≥100(+0.08) + residential(+0.05) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.55. Fires at threshold.

description: Palletized shipment to apartment, no dock
rationale: Residential fires at 0.95. Liftgate score: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized≥500(+0.15) + residential+weight≥100(+0.08) + residential(+0.05) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.55.

description: Heavy loose freight to residential, dock unknown
rationale: Residential fires at 0.95. Liftgate score: loose≥150(+0.15) + residential+weight≥100(+0.08) + residential(+0.05) + dockUnknown(-0.08) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.12. Below 0.55 threshold, does not fire. Advisory generated internally but not a recommendation.

description: Moderate weight residential, no dock, multiple units
rationale: Residential fires at 0.95. Liftgate score: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + residential+weight≥100(+0.08) + residential(+0.05) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.55. Fires. Multiple HU to residential generates a delivery_complexity advisory, but limited_access is NOT recommended — that requires location signals, not just HU count.

description: Standard commercial warehouse with dock
rationale: Commercial warehouse with dock. Liftgate score: palletized≥500(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.07. No fire.

description: Light commercial to retail store with dock
rationale: Under all weight thresholds (loose < 150 lbs), commercial, dock available. No accessorials.

description: Heavy palletized to commercial warehouse with dock
rationale: Even very heavy, dock + warehouse = no accessorials. Liftgate score stays low without dockNo signal.

description: Crated shipment to commercial with dock
rationale: Crated treated as palletized. Commercial, dock available. No accessorials.

description: Delivery to a school
rationale: School is in LIMITED_ACCESS_LOCATION_TYPES, base score 0.82. No additional signals. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized 400<500(0) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.27, below 0.55 threshold.

description: Heavy delivery to construction site
rationale: Construction site is in LIMITED_ACCESS_LOCATION_TYPES, score 0.82. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized≥500(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42, below 0.55 threshold. Without confirmed forklift_available=no, liftgate does not reach recommendation threshold.

description: Delivery to a church, light shipment
rationale: Church is in LIMITED_ACCESS_LOCATION_TYPES, score 0.82. 50 lbs loose is hand-carryable, liftgate score: dockNo(+0.35) + loose<150(0) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.27. No liftgate.

description: Delivery to a mall
rationale: Mall is in LIMITED_ACCESS_LOCATION_TYPES, score 0.82. Liftgate: dockUnknown(-0.08) + palletized<500(0) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = -0.16. No liftgate.

description: Heavy loose to commercial, no dock
rationale: Commercial retail, not residential, not limited access. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold. Without forklift_available=no, score insufficient. No accessorials.

description: Very heavy palletized to commercial, no dock
rationale: Commercial retail. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized≥500(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold. Liftgate requires confirmation of forklift unavailability to cross threshold.

description: Heavy loose to commercial, dock unknown
rationale: Commercial retail, dock unknown. Liftgate: dockUnknown(-0.08) + loose≥150(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = -0.01. No fire. Missing dock AND forklift info yields insufficient signal.

description: Heavy crated to commercial, no dock
rationale: Crated treated as palletized. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized≥500(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold.

description: Loose freight at exactly 300 lbs, no dock, commercial
rationale: 300 lbs loose, no dock, commercial. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold. Commercial with unknown forklift is insufficient to recommend.

description: Loose freight at 290 lbs, no dock, commercial
rationale: 290 lbs loose, no dock. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. No fire.

description: Palletized at exactly 500 lbs, no dock
rationale: 500 lbs palletized, no dock, commercial. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized≥500(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold. Requires forklift signal to cross.

description: Palletized at 490 lbs, no dock
rationale: 490 lbs palletized, no dock. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized<500(0) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.27. No fire.

description: Unknown consignee, unknown dock, moderate weight
rationale: Unknown consignee and location. Not residential, not limited access. Liftgate: dockUnknown(-0.08) + loose≥150(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = -0.01. System correctly refuses to recommend without sufficient signal.

description: Unknown everything, light shipment
rationale: All signals unknown + light weight. No rules should fire. System does not guess.

description: Missing weight field
rationale: Residential rule fires regardless of weight. hasWeight=false so all liftgate weight bonuses skip. Liftgate score: dockNo(+0.35) + residential(+0.05) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.32, below 0.55. No liftgate.

description: Commercial unknown dock, heavy palletized
rationale: Commercial, dock unknown. Liftgate: dockUnknown(-0.08) + palletized≥500(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = -0.01. Insufficient signal without dock or forklift confirmation.

description: Residential + liftgate + multiple handling units
rationale: Residential fires at 0.95. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + residential+weight≥100(+0.08) + residential(+0.05) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.55. Fires. 5 HU generates delivery_complexity advisory only — limited_access is NOT recommended because multiple HU alone is not a location-based access restriction.

description: Hospital + heavy palletized, no dock
rationale: Hospital is in LIMITED_ACCESS_LOCATION_TYPES, score 0.82. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + palletized≥500(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold. Without forklift_available=no, liftgate does not fire.

description: Government building + heavy loose, no dock
rationale: Government building is in LIMITED_ACCESS_LOCATION_TYPES, score 0.82. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold.

description: Light palletized to commercial with dock
rationale: Light, commercial, warehouse, dock. Zero accessorials.

description: Medium weight crated to commercial with dock
rationale: Commercial, has dock, crated. No triggers.

description: Light loose to commercial with dock
rationale: Very light, commercial, dock. No accessorials.

description: Delivery to a storage unit, heavy loose, no dock
rationale: Storage unit is in LIMITED_ACCESS_LOCATION_TYPES, score 0.82. Liftgate: dockNo(+0.35) + loose≥150(+0.15) + forkliftUnknown(-0.08) = 0.42. Below 0.55 threshold. No liftgate without forklift confirmation.

description: Light delivery to a self storage facility
rationale: Storage unit = limited access regardless of weight. Light freight, no liftgate needed.
